description_long: This is a modern residential bungalow complex surrounded by a perimeter of trees, featuring multiple interconnected single-story structures with flat and slightly sloped roofs. The property includes a central main house with large windows, a visible swimming pool, and several outbuildings, possibly garages or guest houses. The grounds are landscaped with paved walkways, driveways, and a tennis or basketball court, all enclosed by a dense line of trees for privacy. The main building has open-plan living spaces, visible through large glass panels, and outdoor seating areas. The roofs are predominantly flat, with some sections featuring overhangs or terraces. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between living, recreational, and utility zones.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow complex with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, sports court, and landscaped grounds surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance area, the central house, and the sports court on the right, with dense tree coverage outlining the property.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the pool area, rear outbuildings, and the sports court, with the main house partially obscured by trees.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the pool, the main house, and the driveway, with the sports court and outbuildings in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the main house's open-plan living area, the driveway, and the pool, with the sports court visible to the far side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass panels
